goal: 解决 PR #170 与最新 main 的 agent guidance 冲突

summary.title: 解决 PR #170 与最新 main 的 guidance 冲突
summary.what: 将 origin/main 合并进 PR #170 分支，解决 AGENTS.md 和 internal/engine/templates/agents-md.md 的冲突。冲突 resolution 保留本分支的 semantic stop-line guidance / AGENTS v26，同时接受最新 main 已合入的 seal_result_schema / SealResult starter 相关上游改动。AGENTS.md 重新通过 mainline agents update/readback 确认为 in_sync。
summary.why: GitHub 报告 PR #170 与最新 main 在 AGENTS.md 和 agents-md template 上有冲突。该 PR 需要同时保留本分支对 canonical skill/agent guidance 的语义化 stop-line 清理，以及 main 上已经合入的 seal schema/template guard 改动，才能继续 review。
summary.user_goal: 解决 PR #170 与最新 main 的 agent guidance 冲突

decisions.chose: merge origin/main into the PR branch instead of rebasing
decisions.rationale: PR branch already exists on origin; a merge commit resolves GitHub conflicts without force-pushing or rewriting published branch history.

decisions.chose: keep this branch's v26 semantic stop-line guidance while accepting main's seal schema guard content
decisions.rationale: The two changes are complementary: this PR owns the canonical stop-line wording, while main carries the already-merged SealResult schema guidance.

decisions.chose: leave PR #170's body focused on the canonical skill cleanup intent rather than replacing it with this conflict-repair intent
decisions.rationale: The conflict repair is a delivery maintenance step for the same PR; replacing the body would hide the review-relevant feature intent.

rejected.alternative: Prefer origin/main's older AGENTS version marker over this branch's v26 guidance
rejected.reason: That would drop the current PR's semantic stop-line guidance and make agents check report stale/out-of-sync state.

rejected.alternative: Rebase and force-push the PR branch
rejected.reason: A merge commit is safer for an already-published review branch and sufficient to clear GitHub conflicts.

review_notes: Focused verification after conflict resolution: git diff --check; go run . agents check --json; go test ./internal/engine -run 'TestAgents|TestSeal|TestDefaultSkillInstallCommandIsNonInteractive|TestInitWritesConfigAndIdentity' -count=1.
mainline agents check reports AGENTS.md in_sync at version 26.

architectural_claims: The PR branch now includes latest main's SealResult schema guard work and this branch's semantic stop-line guidance in one conflict-free tree.
AGENTS managed guidance version remains v26 and in sync after merging origin/main.
behavioral_changes: GitHub PR #170 should no longer have content conflicts with main for AGENTS.md and internal/engine/templates/agents-md.md.
Agent-facing guidance preserves semantic instruction classes instead of phrase-level override tables.
migration_notes: This is a merge-conflict repair on the existing PR branch; no new user-facing migration is introduced.
